overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through a sunlit forest. The character moves steadily through dense woodland that gradually transitions to more open areas with atmospheric mist and distant mountain vistas visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with rocky outcrops and thick canopy

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with two swords strapped to his back, moving through dappled sunlight

entered.detail: Dense tall pine trees forming a thick forest canopy on the left side of the path
Winding dirt trail with patches of grass and stones running through the forest
Lush green grass and shrubs lining both sides of the forest path
Large moss-covered rock outcrop visible through the trees on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense forest with tall pine trees forming a thick canopy overhead. Geralt walks steadily along a winding dirt path surrounded by lush green undergrowth, with dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves. A large rock formation is visible to the left as the path curves gently through the woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail opening into misty clearing on the right

events.description: ground mist becomes visible on the right side of the path, creating atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path as the forest opens up, revealing misty areas to the right

entered.detail: Low-lying white mist hovering over the ground on the right side of the path
Colorful wildflowers including pink and orange blooms growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: As the path continues, the forest opens slightly and ground mist becomes visible on the right, creating an atmospheric effect. The lighting becomes brighter and more direct as the canopy thins. Colorful wildflowers appear along the trail edges, and the trees on the right recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest path with persistent mist and distant mountain views

events.description: path curves revealing distant mountain vista through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the curving path as the forest opens to reveal distant landscapes and persistent mist

entered.detail: Hazy mountain peaks visible through the trees in the far distance
Small rocky outcrop with sparse vegetation on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the path curving through a more open forest area with persistent mist rolling in from the right. Distant mountains become visible through the trees ahead, and the terrain features small rock outcrops. The atmosphere remains serene as Geralt continues his journey along the winding trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, shaded woodland that gradually opens into a misty, expansive forest landscape. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path under a thick canopy of pine trees, where dappled sunlight filters through the leaves and brushes against a large rock formation. As the path continues, the canopy thins and the lighting becomes brighter and more direct, allowing colorful wildflowers to emerge along the trail edges while ground mist begins to drift in from the right. The scene then expands into a more open forest area where the mist becomes more persistent and rolls across the terrain. Finally, the camera follows the curving trail past small rock outcrops as distant mountains reveal themselves through the trees ahead.
